name: Loi des Gaz Parfaits
description: Calculez la variable inconnue de la loi des gaz parfaits.
seo_title: Loi des Gaz Parfaits – Outil Gratuit
seo_description: Calculez la variable inconnue de la loi des gaz parfaits. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Calculatrice facile a utiliser avec decomposition de.
example_label: Find the missing variable (T=0) in ideal gas law with P=202650 Pa, V=0.m³, n=1.mol.
result_context: The missing variable is calculeted: {missing} using PV = nRT where R = 8.314 J/(mol·K).
formula_display: PV = nRT (set one variable to to solve for it)
steps: Given: P=202650 Pa, V=0.m³, n=1.mol, T=0 (unknown)
mistakes: Not setting exactly one variable to for solving
Using wrong value for gas constant R
Using Celsius instead of Kelvin for temperature
